items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding the separation of transactional and marketing messages. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations that demonstrate this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this separation but lacks concrete evidence to confirm compliance, leading to an inconclusive status.
